sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pasian ta ka hih | nung sang
Lungdam na koh ding sim loh,

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khitui luang kaom laitak, kakhitui hong nulsak a.
A ang sung ket hong pom ta.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Natna in kei hong tuam in,
Hong vehding ka neih loh lai, Thoto in nadam zo hi.
Hong cih man ka damsiang ta.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tu'n kei pawh patau nawn ke'ng.
Mawh maisak pa nei zo ing, Mawhna in keihong zol hang
